title: [YTPMV] Cheers Maddie (A wild ZORB appeared!)
description: Like those classic YTPMVs without pitch shifting, when electricthecheese was the big cheese (and now he's not so big a cheese, although he admits he IS fat). It's really easy to make a YTPMV with a short clip and a drum loop and, in fact, that's how they used to be made.
